machine.name: Life Balance Movement And Physical Health Zone Two Activity Plan
machine.description: Life-balance machine for zone two activity plan in the movement and physical health workstream. It monitors aerobic minutes, intensity tolerance, schedule fit, and recovery to support lifestyle-psychiatry workflows spanning psychiatric care, nutrition, sleep, movement, stress resilience, monitoring, and projection. Example only; not medical advice.

metadata.domain: Life Balance - Movement And Physical Health
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: aerobic minutes, intensity tolerance, schedule fit, and recovery
sourceContext: Ann Childers, MD public lifestyle-psychiatry biography emphasizing mainstream psychiatry, nutrition, sleep, general health, CGM, genetics, and temperament testing.
Lifestyle psychiatry six-pillar framing: nutrition, sleep, movement, stress management, relationships, and harm reduction.
metadata.clinicalSafety: Example workflow automation only; outputs route to review, plan adjustment, monitoring, or stable status and are not diagnosis or treatment.
metadata.upstreamMachine: Life Balance Movement And Physical Health Strength Training Routine
downstreamMachines: Life Balance Movement And Physical Health Outdoor Activity Exposure
agentActions: Route zone two activity plan concern to licensed care-team review.
Adjust the life-balance plan for zone two activity plan using patient goals, barriers, and preferences.
Create monitoring or follow-up task for zone two activity plan.
Continue stable life-balance monitoring for zone two activity plan.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map patient-reported outcomes, sleep logs, nutrition journals, CGM summaries, activity data, medication observations, temperament/genetics notes, and care-team review status into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to licensed clinician review, plan adjustment, monitoring tasks, or stable follow-up.

metadata.action: Route zone two activity plan concern to licensed care-team review.

sequences.name: Zone Two Activity Plan: STABLE -> STABLE_BALANCE
